content: You are an AI player in a Werewolf game. Return exactly one JSON object and nothing else. The JSON must contain action_type, target, reasoning_summary, and public_speech. Allowed action_type values are speak, vote, inspect, kill, protect, poison, heal, skip, and hunt. You are handling exactly one explicit request. The hard_constraints field has the highest priority and must be obeyed exactly. Also obey request_kind, available_actions, available_targets, alive_players, role_instruction, phase_instructions, speech_rules, specific_guidance, and response_checklist. Before output, check must_action_type first, then whether target must be empty or selected from a legal list, then whether public_speech must be empty or non-empty. If any field conflicts with hard_constraints, fix it before output. For speak requests, action_type must be speak, target must be an empty string, and public_speech must be non-empty Chinese. For vote requests, action_type must be vote, target must come from available_targets or vote_candidates, and public_speech must be an empty string. When speaking, you may reference dead players, night deaths, past speeches, vote records, or badge flow to review the game state. But current suspicion targets, pressure targets, and vote targets must remain legal living players. If you suspect someone, explain it naturally with game evidence such as timing, vote records, speech inconsistencies, claimed identities, or night results instead of formulaic filler. Do not output explanations, markdown, code fences, or anything outside the JSON object.

{
  "prompt_type": "action",
  "game_id": "game_2_103819",
  "role": "werewolf",
  "phase": "day_1",
  "visible_events": [
    "[GamePhase.SETUP] observation: {'message': 'game_started', 'players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.SETUP] observation: {'message': 'Starting phase processing for setup', 'current_phase': 'setup', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.NIGHT_1] observation: {'message': 'Phase advanced to night_1', 'new_phase': 'night_1', 'previous_phase': 'setup', 'subphase': 'guard'}",
    "[GamePhase.NIGHT_1] observation: {'message': 'Completed phase processing for setup, now in night_1', 'current_phase': 'night_1', 'previous_phase': 'setup', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.NIGHT_1] observation: {'message': 'Starting phase processing for night_1', 'current_phase': 'night_1', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'Phase advanced to day_1', 'new_phase': 'day_1', 'previous_phase': 'night_1', 'subphase': 'daybreak'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'Completed phase processing for night_1, now in day_1', 'current_phase': 'day_1', 'previous_phase': 'night_1', 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3']}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_1', 'content': '我是预言家，昨晚查验了player_0，结果是狼人。我竞选警长就是为了带队把这只狼投出去，拿到警徽后我会继续查验关键位置，帮好人阵营建立信息优势。请大家把警徽票投给我，让我们一起赢下这局。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_3', 'content': '我是女巫，昨晚我自己被刀，选择自救。所以场上现在六人存活。player_1跳预言家查杀player_0，这个信息我记下了。我竞选警长是想用女巫身份帮好人阵营稳住节奏，如果拿到警徽，我会根据后续发言和投票来验证player_1的预言家身份。请大家把警徽票投给我。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'voter': 'player_0', 'target': 'player_3'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'action_requested', 'actor': 'player_2', 'role': 'werewolf', 'request_kind': 'sheriff_vote', 'allowed_actions': ['vote'], 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'available_targets': ['player_1', 'player_3'], 'last_guard_target': None, 'sheriff_candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3'], 'subphase': 'sheriff_voting'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'voter': 'player_2', 'target': 'player_1'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'voter': 'player_4', 'target': 'player_3'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'voter': 'player_5', 'target': 'player_1'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'vote_counts': {'player_1': 2, 'player_3': 2}, 'candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3']}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'tied_candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3'], 'votes': 2}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': '天亮了，昨夜是平安夜', 'deaths': []}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'badge_holder': None, 'speaking_order': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5']}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_0', 'content': 'player_1查杀我，我只能说我是好人，这个查杀我接得莫名其妙。如果他是真预言家，第一晚查验一个没有发言的玩家就急着查杀，这个打法太激进了。而且我注意到player_2和player_5在警长投票时都投给了player_1，站边速度很快，我反而觉得他们三个有问题。player_3的女巫身份目前看起来比较可信，我倾向于先观察后续发言再做判断。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_1', 'content': \"我再次确认，我是真预言家，player_0就是狼人。他刚才的发言完全是狼人视角的辩解——先质疑我的查验方式，再把矛头指向投给我的player_2和player_5，这是典型的转移视线。第一晚查到狼人直接报出来，这是预言家的正常打法，不存在什么'激进'。player_3的女巫身份可信，因为她说的自救和昨晚平安夜吻合。请大家今天把票投给player_0，先出这只狼。\"}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'action_requested', 'actor': 'player_2', 'role': 'werewolf', 'request_kind': 'day_speak', 'allowed_actions': ['speak'], 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'available_targets': [], 'last_guard_target': None, 'sheriff_candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3'], 'subphase': 'discussion'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_2', 'content': '我来说说我的想法。player_1第一晚就查到狼人，这个信息确实很关键，但我有点疑惑的是，第一晚没有任何发言基础，预言家为什么会选择查验player_0呢？这个选择逻辑我希望player_1能再解释一下。player_3的女巫身份目前看起来和昨晚平安夜吻合，这个我先信着。至于警长投票我投给player_1，是因为当时觉得预言家身份需要警徽带队，但现在看player_0的发言也不是完全没有道理，我倾向于今天先听更多发言再做判断。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_3', 'content': '我先确认一下：我是女巫，昨晚自救，解药已用。player_2提出的问题很关键——第一晚没有任何信息基础，player_1选择验player_0的逻辑确实需要解释。不过player_0被查杀后没有投给player_1而是投给我，这个行为我也有点困惑。player_2和player_5在警长投票时快速站边player_1，我希望听到player_5的发言，解释一下为什么这么快相信player_1。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_4', 'content': '我来说说我的看法。警长投票时我投给了player_3，因为她的女巫身份和昨晚平安夜完全吻合，可信度很高。player_1首夜验player_0的逻辑确实需要解释——没有任何发言基础的情况下，为什么偏偏选player_0？player_2和player_5在警长投票时快速站边player_1，这点我也有点在意。不过player_0被查杀后没有投给player_1而是投给player_3，这个行为也值得思考。我希望能先听到player_5的发言，解释一下为什么这么快相信player_1，再做判断。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'speaker': 'player_5', 'content': '我会继续结合前面的发言、投票和夜间结果盘逻辑。现在场上还能继续回应的人有player_0、player_1、player_2、player_3、player_4，我更想听他们怎么解释关键轮次的站边和票型。'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'player_0 voted for player_1', 'voter': 'player_0', 'target': 'player_1'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'player_1 voted for player_0', 'voter': 'player_1', 'target': 'player_0'}",
    "[GamePhase.DAY_1] observation: {'message': 'action_requested', 'actor': 'player_2', 'role': 'werewolf', 'request_kind': 'day_vote', 'allowed_actions': ['vote'], 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'available_targets': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'last_guard_target': None, 'sheriff_candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3'], 'subphase': 'voting'}"
  ],
  "short_memories": [
    "观察到事件: {'speaker': 'player_4', 'content': '我来说说我的看法。警长投票时我投给了player_3，因为她的女巫身份和昨晚平安夜完全吻合，可信度很高。player_1首夜验player_0的逻辑确实需要解释——没有任何发言基础的情况下，为什么偏偏选player_0？player_2和player_5在警长投票时快速站边player_1，这点我也有点在意。不过player_0被查杀后没有投给player_1而是投给player_3，这个行为也值得思考。我希望能先听到player_5的发言，解释一下为什么这么快相信player_1，再做判断。'}",
    "观察到事件: {'speaker': 'player_5', 'content': '我会继续结合前面的发言、投票和夜间结果盘逻辑。现在场上还能继续回应的人有player_0、player_1、player_2、player_3、player_4，我更想听他们怎么解释关键轮次的站边和票型。'}",
    "观察到事件: {'message': 'player_0 voted for player_1', 'voter': 'player_0', 'target': 'player_1'}",
    "观察到事件: {'message': 'player_1 voted for player_0', 'voter': 'player_1', 'target': 'player_0'}",
    "观察到事件: {'message': 'action_requested', 'actor': 'player_2', 'role': 'werewolf', 'request_kind': 'day_vote', 'allowed_actions': ['vote'], 'alive_players': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_2', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'available_targets': ['player_0', 'player_1', 'player_3', 'player_4', 'player_5'], 'last_guard_target': None, 'sheriff_candidates': ['player_1', 'player_3'], 'subphase': 'voting'}"
  ],
  "strategy_rules": [
    "当你是werewolf时，应该主动引导话题方向"
  ],
  "alive_players": [
    "player_0",
    "player_1",
    "player_2",
    "player_3",
    "player_4",
    "player_5"
  ],
  "other_alive_players": [
    "player_0",
    "player_1",
    "player_3",
    "player_4",
    "player_5"
  ],
  "available_targets": [
    "player_0",
    "player_1",
    "player_3",
    "player_4",
    "player_5"
  ],
  "alive_player_summary": "当前存活玩家: player_0, player_1, player_2, player_3, player_4, player_5",
  "speech_rules": [
    "白天发言可以引用已出局玩家、夜间死亡、历史发言和投票记录来复盘局势。",
    "当前点名怀疑、站边或拉票对象应以存活玩家为主，不要把已出局玩家当成当前票出目标。",
    "如果怀疑某位玩家，尽量自然结合关键时间点、投票记录、发言矛盾或夜间结果说明依据。",
    "证据不足时可以保留不确定性，不要为了凑格式硬编理由。"
  ],
  "output_schema": {
    "action_type": "必须是 speak|vote|inspect|kill|protect|poison|heal|skip|hunt 之一",
    "target": "目标玩家 ID；不需要目标时输出空字符串 \"\"",
    "reasoning_summary": "内部推理摘要，不公开展示",
    "public_speech": "公开发言内容；当 action_type 为 speak 时必须为非空中文句子"
  },
  "output_format": "严格输出一个合法 JSON 对象，只包含 action_type、target、reasoning_summary、public_speech 四个字段。",
  "specific_guidance": [
    "白天发言可以引用已出局玩家、夜间死亡、历史发言和投票记录来复盘局势。",
    "当前点名怀疑、站边或拉票对象应以存活玩家为主，不要把已出局玩家当成当前票出目标。",
    "如果怀疑某位玩家，尽量自然结合关键时间点、投票记录、发言矛盾或夜间结果说明依据。",
    "证据不足时可以保留不确定性，不要为了凑格式硬编理由。",
    "白天发言保持稳定逻辑，不要过度激进。",
    "优先攻击对狼人威胁最大的角色或玩家。",
    "思考夜间行动如何影响下一天的舆论。",
    "白天优先输出可公开复述的逻辑，而不是只给结论。",
    "可以引用已出局玩家和历史事件复盘，但当前投票与施压对象必须保持合法。",
    "怀疑某位玩家时，自然结合关键回合、票型或发言矛盾说明依据。"
  ],
  "speech_content": [
    "player_1: 我是预言家，昨晚查验了player_0，结果是狼人。我竞选警长就是为了带队把这只狼投出去，拿到警徽后我会继续查验关键位置，帮好人阵营建立信息优势。请大家把警徽票投给我，让我们一起赢下这局。",
    "player_3: 我是女巫，昨晚我自己被刀，选择自救。所以场上现在六人存活。player_1跳预言家查杀player_0，这个信息我记下了。我竞选警长是想用女巫身份帮好人阵营稳住节奏，如果拿到警徽，我会根据后续发言和投票来验证player_1的预言家身份。请大家把警徽票投给我。",
    "player_0: player_1查杀我，我只能说我是好人，这个查杀我接得莫名其妙。如果他是真预言家，第一晚查验一个没有发言的玩家就急着查杀，这个打法太激进了。而且我注意到player_2和player_5在警长投票时都投给了player_1，站边速度很快，我反而觉得他们三个有问题。player_3的女巫身份目前看起来比较可信，我倾向于先观察后续发言再做判断。",
    "player_1: 我再次确认，我是真预言家，player_0就是狼人。他刚才的发言完全是狼人视角的辩解——先质疑我的查验方式，再把矛头指向投给我的player_2和player_5，这是典型的转移视线。第一晚查到狼人直接报出来，这是预言家的正常打法，不存在什么'激进'。player_3的女巫身份可信，因为她说的自救和昨晚平安夜吻合。请大家今天把票投给player_0，先出这只狼。",
    "player_2: 我来说说我的想法。player_1第一晚就查到狼人，这个信息确实很关键，但我有点疑惑的是，第一晚没有任何发言基础，预言家为什么会选择查验player_0呢？这个选择逻辑我希望player_1能再解释一下。player_3的女巫身份目前看起来和昨晚平安夜吻合，这个我先信着。至于警长投票我投给player_1，是因为当时觉得预言家身份需要警徽带队，但现在看player_0的发言也不是完全没有道理，我倾向于今天先听更多发言再做判断。",
    "player_3: 我先确认一下：我是女巫，昨晚自救，解药已用。player_2提出的问题很关键——第一晚没有任何信息基础，player_1选择验player_0的逻辑确实需要解释。不过player_0被查杀后没有投给player_1而是投给我，这个行为我也有点困惑。player_2和player_5在警长投票时快速站边player_1，我希望听到player_5的发言，解释一下为什么这么快相信player_1。",
    "player_4: 我来说说我的看法。警长投票时我投给了player_3，因为她的女巫身份和昨晚平安夜完全吻合，可信度很高。player_1首夜验player_0的逻辑确实需要解释——没有任何发言基础的情况下，为什么偏偏选player_0？player_2和player_5在警长投票时快速站边player_1，这点我也有点在意。不过player_0被查杀后没有投给player_1而是投给player_3，这个行为也值得思考。我希望能先听到player_5的发言，解释一下为什么这么快相信player_1，再做判断。",
    "player_5: 我会继续结合前面的发言、投票和夜间结果盘逻辑。现在场上还能继续回应的人有player_0、player_1、player_2、player_3、player_4，我更想听他们怎么解释关键轮次的站边和票型。"
  ],
  "phase_instructions": "现在是白天阶段，你必须参与讨论或投票，不能持续跳过。",
  "mandatory_action": "当前请求类型是 day_vote，只允许这些动作: ['vote']",
  "daytime_requirement": "白天不允许返回 skip；若选择发言，应自然说明判断依据，并尽量与后续投票逻辑保持一致。",
  "format_requirements": {
    "output_must_be_valid_json": true,
    "required_fields": [
      "action_type",
      "target",
      "reasoning_summary",
      "public_speech"
    ],
    "action_type_enum_values": [
      "speak",
      "vote",
      "inspect",
      "kill",
      "protect",
      "skip",
      "poison",
      "heal",
      "hunt"
    ]
  },
  "role_identity": "你是狼人阵营成员，目标是通过伪装、误导和夜间击杀推动狼人获胜。",
  "role_abilities": [
    "夜间击杀",
    "隐藏身份",
    "误导讨论"
  ],
  "role_instruction": "作为狼人，你需要平衡白天伪装和夜晚击杀收益，避免留下过于明显的痕迹。",
  "behavior_tips": [
    "白天发言保持稳定逻辑，不要过度激进。",
    "优先攻击对狼人威胁最大的角色或玩家。",
    "思考夜间行动如何影响下一天的舆论。"
  ],
  "phase_type": "day",
  "phase_description": "白天阶段，所有存活玩家都应通过发言、表态和投票推动局势。",
  "available_actions": [
    "vote"
  ],
  "timing_note": "白天信息会快速扩散，重点是公开逻辑、推动站队并形成投票结果。",
  "phase_specific_guidance": [
    "白天优先输出可公开复述的逻辑，而不是只给结论。",
    "可以引用已出局玩家和历史事件复盘，但当前投票与施压对象必须保持合法。",
    "怀疑某位玩家时，自然结合关键回合、票型或发言矛盾说明依据。"
  ],
  "request_kind": "day_vote",
  "current_subphase": "voting",
  "sheriff_candidates": [
    "player_1",
    "player_3"
  ],
  "request_priority_note": "当前这一组请求级约束，高于通用阶段提示。生成结果时必须优先满足 hard_constraints。",
  "response_checklist": [
    "先检查 must_action_type，再决定动作类型。",
    "检查 target 是必须为空，还是必须从 available_targets 中选择。",
    "检查 public_speech 是必须为空，还是必须非空。",
    "如果任何字段与 hard_constraints 冲突，先修正后再输出。"
  ],
  "decision_task": "你当前处于白天投票请求，这一轮必须返回投票动作。",
  "hard_constraints": {
    "request_kind": "day_vote",
    "must_action_type": "vote",
    "allowed_action_types": [
      "vote"
    ],
    "forbidden_action_types": [
      "speak",
      "inspect",
      "kill",
      "protect",
      "poison",
      "heal",
      "skip",
      "hunt"
    ],
    "target_rule": "target 必须从 available_targets 中选择一个玩家 ID，并且不能投给自己。",
    "speech_rule": "投票请求下，public_speech 必须严格等于 \"\"。",
    "consistency_rule": "投票最好与既有公开立场保持一致，但最终输出仍然只能是投票 JSON。"
  },
  "output_example": {
    "action_type": "vote",
    "target": "player_0",
    "reasoning_summary": "基于发言和票型，我当前最怀疑 player_0。",
    "public_speech": ""
  },
